issue_summary_zh: Raw condition has merged-cell style displaced attributes: '(1)相手が ならDEF+15%、 ならDEF-10% cool属性 heat属性'. The attributes appear after the sentence and should fill the earlier blanks as opponent-side conditions. Component (2) says '被アクセス時、リブートしなかったら経験値とスコア獲得', but parser produced def_debuff_2, which contradicts the Japanese effect text.

expected_components.note_zh: Branch should distinguish opponent cool/heat conditions; exact mapping needs snippet/manual confirmation.
No-reboot outcome grants experience and score; should not be DEF debuff.

parser_failure_zh: Postfixed attribute tokens were treated as generic attributes, and value/effect mapping reused DEF text for a label whose condition describes EXP/score. This is a semantic consistency failure, not merely a missing numeric value.
suggested_rule_zh: Validation agent must compare condition_raw effect words against effect_kind and detect trailing attribute placeholders after merged-cell expansion. Parser should flag or split attribute-branch effects instead of force-mapping them to a single own-team attribute filter.
